name: init
description: Initialize this template for a new project. Renames all hardcoded identifiers (project name, package scope, descriptions, container names) across the entire repo. Optionally scaffolds an MCP server.

commands.init: Prompt for project details and rename everything

inputs.name: PROJECT_SLUG
inputs.description: kebab-case slug (e.g. 'my-awesome-app'). Auto-derived from name if omitted.

inputs.name: PACKAGE_SCOPE
inputs.description: npm package scope without @ (e.g. 'myorg'). Defaults to 'repo'.

inputs.name: DESCRIPTION
inputs.description: One-line project description for API and metadata.

inputs.name: SETUP_MCP
inputs.description: Set to 'y' to scaffold an MCP server package at packages/mcp-server/.

notes: Run once after cloning the template.
Idempotent — safe to run again if values need changing.
Does NOT touch lock files (pnpm-lock.yaml, uv.lock).
Run 'make setup' after to regenerate lock files.
All inputs can be passed as env vars for non-interactive use.
